data.title: Worktree-isolated sub-agent writes files to session branch instead of isolated worktree
data.description:
Agent dispatched with isolation='worktree' (Agent tool parameter explicitly set) created files in the orchestrator's session branch working directory instead of its isolated worktree directory.

Observed: Agent a5a2e497 was dispatched for story 6121-46dc with isolation='worktree'. Its assigned worktree was /Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra/.claude/worktrees/agent-a5a2e497. However, the agent wrote all files to the session branch directory /Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra-worktrees/worktree-20260416-132412/ — the orchestrator's CWD — instead.

Files written to session branch (should have gone to isolated worktree):
- plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md (NEW)
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/cross-epic-scan.md (NEW)
- tests/skills/test-brainstorm-cross-epic-scan.sh (NEW)
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (MODIFIED)
- .test-index (MODIFIED)
- plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json (MODIFIED)

Impact: Blocked harvest of other worktrees (e4c5-3aad) because session branch had unstaged changes to files the merge needed to update (.test-index). Required committing session branch changes directly instead of via harvest-worktree.sh protocol.

Expected: With isolation='worktree', the agent should operate entirely within its assigned worktree path and never touch the orchestrator's working directory.
